assets/gallery/photos/Day3/day3-18.jpg.caption: Pic 12: The cross given to Bronisława Korzeniowska née Milewska by Amour Collin

assets/gallery/photos/Day3/day3-20.jpg.caption: Pic 13- The cramped and unsanitary bunked beds where inmates had to sleep. Pic 14- A watchtower: where Nazi officials used to watch inmates

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/1.jpg.caption: Pic 1: View from the outside of Belzec, one of many Nazi death camps where Jews were sent to be exterminated

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/2.jpg.caption: Pic 2: Path that Jews would walk on as they approached the gas chambers in Belzec

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/3.jpg.caption: Pic 3: View from the end of the path that Jews would walk on as they approached the gas chambers in Belzec

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/4.jpg.caption: Pic 4: Memorial to the Jews lost in Belzec, as well as a call to action

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/5.jpg.caption: Pic 5: The rubble of Belzec, which was left there so that the camp’s existence and the atrocities committed couldn’t be erased and forgotten

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/6.JPG.caption: Pic 6: Railroad tracks stacked on top of each other that were part of the railroad that brought Jews to Belzec

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/7.JPG.caption: Pic 7: View of shoes within the Belzec museum that were taken from the Jews processed and killed there

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/8.JPG.caption: Pic 8: View of moat surrounding Zamość Fortress

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/9.jpg.caption: Pic 9: View down a tunnel connected Zamość Fortress

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/10.jpg.caption: Pic 10: View down a street of Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/11.JPG.caption: Pic 11: View down another street of Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/12.jpg.caption: Pic 12: Torah scroll left behind by traveling Jews during the Nazis advance that was eventually donated to a synagogue (might need to correct me I cant remember exactly)

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/13.jpg.caption: Pic 13: Memorial of Allan Gerson, son of Holocaust survivors and attorney.

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/14.JPG.caption: Pic 14: View of Torah scroll within a synagogue in Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/15.jpg.caption: Pic 15: Buildings in the Great Market Square in Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/17.JPG.caption: Pic 17: View down a street in the Great Market Square in Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/18.JPG.caption: Pic 18: (I don’t know the context of this statue) next to the Parish of the Resurrection of the Lord and St. Thomas the Apostle in Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/19.jpg.caption: Pic 19: Statue of St. John Paul II, who was pope from 1978 to 2005, outside of the Parish of the Resurrection of the Lord and St. Thomas the Apostle in Zamość

assets/gallery/photos/Day4/20.jpg.caption: Pic 20: View of the sunset near the Zamość Fortress
